N1252 Lessor Navarino Rd, Bonduel, WI 54107, USA

*BEAR TRACKS SIGHTED in early summer near the river, proceed with relative caution*

Stay Aware.
USE A BELL OR NOISEMAKER TO LET IT KNOW YOURE THERE!
So you dont surprise it.
A surprised bear is a scared angry bear.
Always pack spray when exploring new forest.
